features: 【2 Gang Extension Cable】2 Connection sockets serve 13A/250V/3120W, enable you to power up 2 electrical appliances together like computer, smart phone, printer, monitor etc. With the extension cord you can easily convert the wall outlet into 2, ideal for using in bedroom, kitchen, living room, office etc.

【1M Length Extension Lead】This extension lead features with 1M length cable, ideal for extend the length for other extension lead which the cable is not long enough to charging multiple appliances from distance in the office or living room.

【Childproof Design】Built-in children protection safety door, designed for the protection of young children from mis-insertion of fingers into the plug sockets, eliminating the hidden dangers. CE&UKCA Approved.

【Wall Mounted Socket Extensions】With 2 keyhole mounting slots on the rear of the extension socket, you can hang it wherever you want, fixed on the wall or hidden under the desk, which provides a great solution for space-saving and making the desktop tidy and well-organized.
【High Quality Service】Your satisfaction is priored for us. Any question about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description EXTRASTAR 2 WAY EXTENSION LEAD with 1M/3M/5M CABLE, BASIC 13A POWER STRIP MAX. 3120W for Home Office School Specifications Material PVC Material Fireproof Resistant to 750℃ Temperature Sockets Quantity 2 Sockets Power Rating 3120W (250V 13A) Length of Power Strip 1M/2M/3M/5M KEY FEATURES SAFETY DESIGN The 2 sockets extension cable with the basic style has approved the CE and UKCA standards. Built-in children protection safety door helps to avoid the mis-insertion of fingers into the plug sockets and prevents the child from any hidden danger. 2 KEYSLOTS WALL MOUNTED With 2 keyhole mounting slots on the rear of the 2 gang extension lead, you can hang it on the wall or hidden it under the desk as you like. 13 AMP FUSED UK PLUG The 13amp fused UK plug extension lead is completely compliant with British standards. Fireproof PVC material can resist 750℃ temperature.
